description:
No .github/ exists. Neither the default `mix test` lane nor the `mix test.integration` alias (which gates the real path-dep + archive install paths) runs automatically.

Add .github/workflows/ci.yml:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors
- mix test
- mix test.integration (downstream_adoption + archive_install)
- (optional) mix format --check-formatted

Pin Elixir 1.19 / OTP 28 to match the declared `elixir: "~> 1.19"` constraint.

Acceptance: CI runs green on push/PR.

comments.text: WORKER_ERROR: cannot deliver 'CI runs green' — `mix test.integration` is RED on clean main HEAD (196bb8c). The archive_install_test fails reproducibly (in isolation too): `mix mutagen` from an archive-installed host aborts with runtime_load_failed, Last error {:telemetry,{'no such file or directory','telemetry.app'}}. Root cause: the built .ez bundles only mutagen_ex's own ebin (probe/ebin/mutagen_ex.app + Elixir.MutagenEx.Telemetry.beam) and does NOT include the :telemetry dep, so the archive runtime-repair path (mutagen.cli.r16) can't load telemetry. This is a pre-existing product bug, out of scope for an 'add CI workflow' ticket. compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test (640/0), and the downstream_adoption integration test all pass; only archive_install is red. Not iterating per worker contract — orchestrator decides: fix archive telemetry bundling first, or descope archive_install from the gating CI lane.

PARENT EPIC BRANCH RENAMED (2026-06-23): merge-back target epic/hcs -> mutagen-hcs/hex-pm-publish-hygiene. This stage's own branch/worktree are unchanged (mutagen-hcs.5/github-actions-ci @ ../mutagen_ex-github-actions-ci). Upstream tracking repointed.

title: Add GitHub Actions CI
